title: Cross-species single-cell and spatial transcriptomic mapping reveals EFNA1-EPHA4-mediated stem-like epithelial-macrophage crosstalk driving colorectal cancer progression.
snippet: Colorectal cancer (CRC) typically follows the "normal-adenoma-carcinoma" (NAC) progression, with approximately 70-90% of cases driven by an adenomatous polyposis coli (APC) mutation-dependent pathway. The Apc-mutant (Min) mouse, valuable for dissecting gene function and mechanisms in CRC, provides an important basis for cross-species analyses with human dat...
